results.title: TE Connectivity Hiring Data Engineer | Jobformore
highlights:
TE Connectivity Hiring Data Engineer | Jobformore
...
# Data Engineer
...
Bangalore 1 Years ₹6–11 LPA Posted 1 days ago 💼 Full Time
...
## Job Description
...
IT Data Analyst is a data-oriented role, focused on delivering transparent MI package, process mining solutions, ad-hoc analysis combined with general sense of aesthetics and process optimization. Drive for excellence, ability to move from conclusions to actions to improve processes, combined with good communication skills characterize a perfect candidate for this position.
...
### What your background should look like:
...
- Building solutions in Celonis EMS (application tools, reports, etc.) that help end to end functions across global FSC in their daily work
...
- Improving automated data pipeline of extraction, transfer, and load (ETL).
...
- Maintaining system integrations and creating re-usable collateral, best practices & tools within reporting center
...
- Designing and developing the technical requirements of Celonis based on the approved Use Cases business process requirements from the FSC operations, aligned with the Celonis project pipeline
...
- Analyzing data & trends to manage use cases and propose for improving opportunities
...
- Being the point of contact and subject matter expert for ad hoc data and analytics requests
...
- Continuously enabling users by providing best practices and tips on tool usage including conducting technical trainings
...
- Exceptional problem-solving, organizational, and research skills with attention to detail
...
- Passion for identifying and solving issues using quantitative approaches and translating insights into actionable recommendations
...
- Proactive approach to process mining and other analytical tasks
...
- Ability to balance a fast-paced working environment with the need for precision, while applying pragmatism to solve data-related issues and achieve fast results if needed
...
- Very good SQL Knowledge, along with proficiency in SAP, Oracle ERP solutions
...
- At least 1 year of practical experience in Business Intelligence, Data Analysis, or Data Science
...
- Excellent communication and presentation skills, including fluent business English
...
- Additional programming skills (e.g., R, Python) and experience with Google BigQuery are a plus
...
- Experience in Process Mining, familiarity with Celonis or Signavio is a big plus
...
### Key Skills
...
BigQuery Celonis ETL Oracle ERP SAP SQL
...
TE Connectivity is a global technology company that designs and manufactures connectivity and sensor solutions for critical industries. The company holds a strong position in industrial and enterprise technology, supported by its engineering scale, global footprint, and focus on reliable data-driven operations. TE Connectivity is recognized for helping organizations improve efficiency, visibility, and performance through advanced digital and analytical solutions.

results.title: Sonny Osunkwo
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist (Expert Innovator (10+Granted Patents) at TE Connectivity) | Machine Learning & Computer Vision Engineer | Manufacturing Intelligence | MLOps & Edge AI | USAF Veteran
...
Senior Data Scientist (Expert Innovator) Machine Learning and Computer Vision Engineer at [TE Connectivity](https://www.linkedin.com/company/te-connectivity)
...
At TE Connectivity, I serve as a Senior Data Scientist and Machine Vision Engineer, where my work centers on driving AI strategy and transforming operational efficiency. I have led the development of advanced inspection-automation systems running successfully in production, including a one-class classifier built with convolutional autoencoders for data drift detection as well as a supervised detection framework leveraging YOLOv8. These solutions are projected to deliver more than $20M in time and labor savings over the next five years.With prior experience as both a Machine Learning Engineer and a Technical Program Manager, I have overseen end-to-end AI integration initiatives that automate critical production workflows. Our team’s efforts have eliminated manual inspection across 25 sites globally, resulting in recurring annual savings of approximately $1M validated by TE Finance.In addition to technical delivery, I partner closely with internal legal and engineering stakeholders to safeguard TE’s AI-driven innovations. I have generated 11 approved US patents for TE and was honored as an Expert Innovator at TECHCON 2025—one of only 287 individuals in TE’s history to receive this distinction. These achievements reflect my commitment to developing cutting-edge solutions that generate lasting business value.
...
Leading the global AI strategy for project Overwatch for the Advanced Manufacturing Process Development group (AMPD) of TE Connectivity’s global Automotive Business Unit, building scalable machine learning systems for defect detection, predictive analytics, and inspection automation across multiple global plants. Drove the transition from proof-of-concept to production-scale AI deployment, integrating deep learning pipelines with TE’s Overwatch manufacturing ecosystem. Recognized as one of TE’s Top Innovators and an Expert Innovator Award recipient (1 of only 283 in TE's history) at TEchCon 2025 (signed by TE’s CTO, Davy Brown) for generating 10+ breakthrough contributions in computer vision and machine learning for TE. Project Overwatch is estimated to generate $20M USD in time, labor and scrap reduction savings in 5 years (YTD savings of over 1M USD)
...
Developed and deployed AI-driven automation solutions that transformed production processes and reduced reliance on manual inspection. Contributed to the design and rollout of TE’s in-house inspection automation platform, now deployed in 25+ sites, eliminating manual inspection tasks and generating ~$1M in annual savings. Partnered with software developers and internal customers to design and integrate new product features, ensuring seamless alignment between AI models and plant-level production systems. Collaborated with TE’s IP managers and legal teams to document and protect new AI innovations, resulting in multiple patent filings and measurable business impact. Leveraged interactive data visualization (Plotly/Dash) to analyze complex manufacturing datasets, enabling clear communication of insights and accelerating data-driven decisions. Identified key project risks, developed mitigation strategies, and secured stakeholder buy-in to ensure successful execution of high-impact AI initiatives. Mentored over 50 university students through TE’s collaborative AI and Machine Learning program (TE AI Cup), guiding projects that achieved ~$100K annual savings across pilot plants. Implemented ML workloads on AWS for scalable cloud deployment and introduced Generative AI/LLM applications in production, pioneering new use cases for intelligent manufacturing analytics.

results.title: Nick Mikulec
highlights:
Data Science Sr. Manager @ TE Connectivity | Analytics, Machine Learning
...
Data Science Sr. Manager at [TE Connectivity](https://www.linkedin.com/company/te-connectivity)
...
I am a Director-level Data Science and Artificial Intelligence leader with 15+ years of experience driving enterprise AI strategy, building high-performing teams, and delivering measurable business outcomes at scale. Currently at TE Connectivity, I lead data science initiatives across a global organization, translating advanced AI/ML capabilities into tangible business value. My work spans AI strategy, operating-model design, talent development, and production-grade machine learning systems, with a strong focus on adoption, governance, and ROI. I have led the design and execution of a hub-and-spoke data science operating model, implemented an enterprise MLOps framework, and modernized hiring and talent processes—resulting in faster time-to-value, higher model adoption, and more resilient AI delivery. These efforts have contributed to over $74M in cost savings and revenue impact in a single fiscal year. I founded and scaled an AI/ML Center of Excellence to elevate analytics maturity across the organization, enabling consistent delivery of predictive and AI-driven solutions while developing strong technical leaders and future managers. My leadership style is pragmatic and business-focused: I partner closely with executives, product leaders, and engineering teams to ensure AI investments align to strategic priorities and deliver sustained impact, not just experimentation. I am passionate about building durable AI organizations, mentoring leaders, and helping companies responsibly leverage data and AI as a competitive advantage.

results.title: Tiago T.
highlights:
Engineering Innovator
...
Senior Simulation & AI ML Engineer (Concept Development) at [TE Connectivity](https://www.linkedin.com/company/te-connectivity)
...
Engineer & inventor with 15+ years of experience at TE Connectivity and ESA Business Incubator, specializing in multiphysics CAE modeling, high-voltage contactors involving innovative arc suppression systems and automotive relays. I hold 10+ international patents and have authored research advancing next-generation automotive battery systems and high-voltage switching devices. My expertise spans structural, thermal, fluid, and electromagnetic domains, bringing deep technical insight into R&D, new product development, and manufacturing. Recognized for pioneering arc modeling methods and mentoring engineering teams, I’m passionate about how AI/ML can accelerate simulation and product design, driving safer and more efficient electromechanical systems. I am always open to connecting with professionals in automotive, energy, and advanced CAE to share knowledge and spark innovation. Core Skills / Tools • CAE & Simulation: Ansys (Mechanical, Maxwell, Fluent), LS-Dyna, Simufact, EMA3D Charge • Design & CAD: Creo, NX, SolidWorks, Fusion 360 • Data & Automation: Python, C++, TensorFlow, Optislang, DOE, Monte Carlo Analysis • Prototyping & Testing: Moldflow, Altium PCB, Arduino, NI CRIO/CDAQ systems
...

- Developed new Python-based workflows for electromagnetic simulations, leveraging pyAnsys and pyAEDT to automate and streamline analysis processes.
- Built machine learning pipelines with TensorFlow to interpret relay mechanical curves, using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for pattern recognition and anomaly detection.
- Generated training datasets combining Monte Carlo simulated curves and FEM-generated data, ensuring robustness across operating conditions and tolerances.
- Leading the introduction of EMA charge plus for high voltage contactor arcing events.
...

DATA & AI · Tekever Remote

# Data Scientist
...
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Data Scientist to join our team and contribute to the development, implementation, and optimization of advanced algorithms and models. Your work will support key teams such as Field Operations, R&D, Flights, Simulation, Autopilot by automating workflows and enhancing decision support, mission planning, and situational awareness capabilities.
...
Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field. A Ph.D. is a plus.
...
Experience: 3+ years of experience in data science and machine learning modeling, with a focus
...
Strong background in machine learning, data science, and analytics, with hands-on experience in building and deploying models.
...
Proven experience working with multi-modal datasets, such as sensor data as time series, GIS data, text, and unstructured data.
...
, model evaluation
...
Key Responsibilities:
...
Design, build, and refine machine learning models and data-driven solutions to address real-world operational challenges.
...
Work across the entire data science lifecycle: from problem scoping and prototyping to data annotation, model training, performance evaluation, and production deployment.
...
Process and analyze diverse datasets, including but not limited to drone sensor data, geospatial (GIS) data, unstructured text, and other sensor modalities.
...
Algorithm Development: Design, develop and implement state-of-the-art algorithms and models, within the context of language models.
...
Capability Development: Realize new AI-based capabilities in areas such as decision support, mission planning, workflow automation, production data support and predictive modeling and maintenance.
...
Model Training and Optimization: Train and optimize models using vast amounts of textual data, ensuring high performance and accuracy.
...
Data Preprocessing: Perform data preprocessing tasks such as data cleaning, outlier detection, feature scaling, and feature encoding to prepare datasets for training and evaluation.
...
Research & Innovation: Stay up to date with the latest advancements in machine learning both classical techniques and deep learning and proactively apply cutting-edge methods to enhance existing models and develop innovative solutions.
...
Performance Evaluation: Evaluate the performance of models using appropriate metrics and techniques and iteratively improve their accuracy and efficiency.
...
Deployment: Collaborate with engineering teams to deploy models into production environments and ensure their robustness and scalability.
...
Technical Skills:
...
Proficient in Python, with hands-on experience using libraries such as NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, and scikit-learn for data analysis and modeling.
...
Machine Learning & Modeling:
...
Expertise in classical ML techniques (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) using scikit-learn, XGBoost, and other ensemble methods.
...
Solid understanding of deep learning architectures for time series analysis, including Transformers, RNNs/LSTMs, and CNNs.
...
Experience with model training, evaluation, and fine-tuning in varied computing environments.
...
Deep Learning Frameworks:
...
Proficient with frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, and TensorRT for building and optimizing deep learning models.
...
Experience working with Hugging Face Transformers for sequence modeling and transfer learning tasks.
...
Cloud & Deployment:
...
Experience deploying production-grade models, including containerization and REST API integration.
...
Familiar with cloud platforms (especially Google Cloud Platform), including ML services, storage, and serverless deployment.
...
Working with the very latest technologies in Data & AI, including Edge AI, Swarming - both within our software platforms and within our embedded on-board systems;

results.title: Teja P.
highlights:
👉 AI/ML Engineer | Gen AI • LLMs • NLP• Prompt Engr | Predictive Analytics & ML Pipelines | Transforming Business with AI solutions & Intelligent Agents
...
Senior AI/ML & Data Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing and delivering large-scale, cloud-native AI and data platforms across Azure, AWS, GCP, and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). I specialize in Generative AI, LLM orchestration, RAG architectures, Python, Apache Spark, SQL, and enterprise-grade MLOps pipelines, transforming complex data into reliable, decision-ready insights and intelligent systems. I’ve led end-to-end AI and data engineering initiatives across diverse sectors, including healthcare, telecommunications, and intelligent systems, for global leaders like Oracle, Cisco, Elevance Health. My work includes architecting HIPAA-compliant Gen AI solutions for clinical insights, developing autonomous analytical agent ecosystems for predictive business intelligence, and optimizing customer retention through ML-driven churn prediction models. I have a proven track record of migrating legacy BI to AI-driven platforms, building real-time streaming pipelines, and delivering solutions that significantly enhance operational efficiency and strategic decision-making. Technically, I’m strongest in LLM fine-tuning (GPT-3, Llama-2, PaLM AI), LangGraph, LangChain, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, Apache Spark/Flink, Kubernetes, Docker, and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate). I possess deep expertise in data modeling (star/snowflake), advanced SQL, and integrating AI with robust governance and observability layers (MLflow). I’m motivated by building scalable, reliable AI and data systems that directly impact business outcomes and drive innovation. I enjoy collaborating closely with data science, product, and executive stakeholders to translate complex challenges into high-impact, production-ready solutions. 📩 Open to senior AI/ML engineering, Gen AI architect, cloud data platform, and intelligent systems roles. Let’s connect and build something impactful.
...
Elevance Health (formerly Anthem) is a Fortune 20 healthcare leader focused on digital transformation and member-centric AI solutions. Enterprise AI Capability & Governance Platform Led the development of HIPAA-compliant Generative AI solutions, focusing on LLM orchestration and RAG to automate the analysis of unstructured clinical notes and claims data. Key Achievements: Architected and deployed end-to-end Gen AI pipelines using Python, Hugging Face, and PyTorch on secure cloud environments, reducing manual data processing effort by 25%. Engineered and optimized RAG architectures integrating vector databases (Pinecone/Weaviate) for clinical decision support, reducing information retrieval time by 30%. Spearheaded LLM fine-tuning and model optimization (e.g., GPT-3, BERT-based models) and quantization techniques to enhance deployment efficiency and performance across AWS/GCP, achieving a 40% reduction in inference latency. Optimized LLM response quality by 45% through advanced prompting strategies (Chain-of-Thought, Tree-of-Thought), significantly improving diagnostic support accuracy. Automated clinical documentation summarization, reducing physician workload by 18% while ensuring strict adherence to HIPAA and Responsible AI governance.

results.title: Johnson Controls – Associate Software Engineer (Data Scientist) - Job Society
highlights:
Johnson Controls is seeking a talented and passionate Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist to join its Data Science & AI team in Pune. This role is an excellent opportunity for aspiring data science professionals who want to work on advanced machine learning, artificial intelligence, and cloud-based analytics solutions. As part of a global technology-driven organization, you will contribute to building intelligent systems that transform complex business challenges into data-driven solutions. The position offers exposure to cutting-edge technologies including machine learning, deep learning, generative AI, cloud computing, and MLOps, making it an ideal opportunity for professionals looking to accelerate their careers in the rapidly evolving field of data science.
...
In this role, you will collaborate with data engineers, AI specialists, cloud architects, and business stakeholders to develop scalable machine learning models and AI-powered applications. You will work extensively with Python, SQL, Microsoft Azure, Azure Machine Learning, Azure Databricks, and Azure OpenAI services to create intelligent solutions that generate measurable business value. The position involves the complete machine learning lifecycle, including data preparation, feature engineering, model development, deployment, monitoring, and optimization. By leveraging advanced analytics and cloud-native technologies, you will help build predictive and automated systems that improve operational efficiency and business decision-making.
...
The Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist role provides an exceptional platform for learning and innovation. Johnson Controls encourages continuous skill development through mentorship programs, certification sponsorships, and hands-on exposure to enterprise-scale AI and machine learning projects. You will gain experience working with modern technologies such as Generative AI, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), deep learning frameworks, and cloud-based MLOps solutions. This position is ideal for candidates who are eager to solve real-world business problems using data, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics while contributing to transformative technology initiatives within a globally recognized organization.
...
• Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning models for classification, regression, forecasting, recommendation systems, and predictive analytics use cases.
...
• Utilize Azure OpenAI and other AI services to develop intelligent applications, automation solutions, and generative AI-powered business capabilities.
...
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial
...
• Understanding of machine learning concepts including supervised learning, unsupervised learning, feature engineering, model evaluation, and hyperparameter tuning.
...
• Experience working with deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch for developing AI and neural network-based solutions.
...
• Understanding of Natural Language Processing (NLP), large language models, Hugging Face libraries, spaCy, NLTK, or related AI technologies is advantageous.
...
• Knowledge of Generative AI, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and prompt engineering concepts will be highly beneficial.
...
The expected salary for an Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist at Johnson Controls in Pune typically ranges between ₹8 LPA and ₹16 LPA, depending on educational background, technical expertise, project experience, cloud certifications, and machine learning proficiency. Candidates with strong Azure cloud knowledge, hands-on AI and machine learning experience, deep learning expertise, and exposure to Generative AI technologies may receive compensation toward the higher end of the range, along with performance incentives, certification sponsorships, learning benefits, and long-term career growth opportunities.

Possesses basic understanding about model accuracies dependency on data quality and able to articulate it in customer discussions.

# Lead Scientist, Artificial Intelligence Research
...
The Senior Engineer, AI is responsible for building AI and Machine learning models and pipelines, with a focus on generative AI, LLMs and predictive modelling. The successful candidate will work closely with data scientists and product leads to implement AI models, build required data and code pipelines through rigorous engineering disciplines You should have expertise in the design, development, management, and maintenance of systems and handling of large datasets. You should have hands on experience with common machine learning and AI frameworks, and a good knowledge of AI and machine learning fundamentals (deep learning, regression, classification and clustering algorithms), retrieval augmented generation pipelines, as well as a good grasp of the design and evaluation of LLM-supported use cases.
...
